name: Deep Roots
description: Run of 3 scores +1 mult

name: Overgrowth
description: Run of 3 scores +2 mult

name: Ancient Grove
description: Run of 3 ×2 score

name: Rich Soil
description: All cards score +1 pip

name: Fertile Ground
description: All cards score +3 pips

name: Kindred
description: Three of a Kind scores +1 mult

name: Trinity
description: Three of a Kind ×2 score

name: Twin Sprouts
description: Pair scores +5 pips

name: Double Bloom
description: Any hand containing a pair ×2 score

name: Worn Path
description: Straight scores +10 pips

name: Long Road
description: Any hand containing a run scores +2 mult per card in the run

name: River Run
description: Straight ×2 score

name: Torrent
description: Runs longer than 3 multiply score — ×2 for Run of 4, ×4 for Straight or Straight Flush

name: Enriched
description: Flush scores +10 pips

name: Deluge
description: Flush ×2 score

name: Rare Bloom
description: Four of a Kind scores +12 mult

name: Perfect Storm
description: Straight Flush ×5 score

name: Early Bird
description: Hands in first 10s score +20 pips

name: Night Owl
description: Hands in last 10s score +3 mult

name: Steady Pace
description: Each hand played scores +1 mult

name: Kindling
description: Same hand streak scores +4 pips × streak

name: Wildfire
description: 3 same hands in a row scores +2 mult

name: Sapling
description: Each level, 3 cards permanently gain +2 pips

name: Swap Shop
description: Swaps increased from 3 to 5 per round

name: Second Harvest
description: Discards increased from 4 to 6 per round

name: Well Stocked
description: Gain +1 swap and +1 discard per round

name: Free Range
description: Swaps limited to 2 per round, but you can swap any 2 cards anywhere on the grid

name: Still Water
description: +5 mult for every 10 seconds elapsed without using a swap

name: Reserves: Swaps
description: Unused swaps carry over to the next round (max 99 total)

name: Reserves: Discards
description: Unused discards carry over to the next round (max 99 total)

name: Reserves: Time
description: Unused round seconds carry over to the next round (max 99s banked)

name: Hidden Pair
description: Hands containing a pair score +10 pips

name: Court of Leaves
description: Face cards (J/Q/K) score +3 pips

name: Low Tide
description: Cards below 6 score +6 pips

name: Before the Tide
description: Cards below 6 score 6× their base pip value instead

name: First Light
description: Aces score +5 pips

name: Heartwood
description: Dead center card permanently gains +5 pips & +1 mult each time scored

name: Resilience
description: Once per game: if you miss the goal, get a 60s second chance

name: First Fruits
description: Each card in first hand each round permanently gains +2 pips

name: Frozen Moment
description: Hands while timer paused score ×2

name: Deep Breath
description: Run of 3 pauses round timer 3s

name: Stale
description: Sandwich pauses round timer 2s

name: Carpe Diem
description: Pause effects become cumulative

name: Lucky Sevens
description: 7s ×2 score

name: Ninesong
description: If pip total is multiple of 9, ×3 score

name: Momentum
description: Consecutive hand within 5s scores +2 mult

name: Knave Power
description: Each Jack in hand doubles running pips when scored

name: Face Value
description: Face cards (J/Q/K) are worth 15 pips

name: Humble Roots
description: Cards below 6 contribute triple pips

name: Echo Hand
description: Playing the same hand type twice in a row scores ×1.5

name: Rising Tide
description: Base mult increases by +1 for each level reached

name: Rye Bread
description: Sandwich ×2 score

name: Long Pause
description: 4-card hands pause the round timer 4s

name: Held Breath
description: Every hand played pauses the round timer 1s

name: Sands of Time
description: Current round time remaining ÷ 2 added as pips

name: Double Take
description: The 2nd card scored retriggeres its effects 3× total

name: Trinity Run
description: Runs containing a 3, 6, or 9 score +9 mult

name: Steady Fours
description: 4-card hands permanently give the 4th card +4 pips

name: Penny Saved
description: Each 5 discarded or played permanently adds +5 pips to this bonus

name: Six Appeal
description: Gain +1 swap each time a 6 is scored

name: Lucky Roll
description: Every 6th card scored gains a random +1–6 mult permanently

name: Octave
description: Each scored 8 has a 1-in-8 chance to retrigger all card effects once more

name: Cloud Nine
description: Each 9 scored is forgotten and permanently adds +9 mult to this bonus

name: Nine Lives
description: Every 9 seconds, gain +1 discard

name: Perfect Ten
description: Every 10 cards discarded permanently adds +1 mult to this bonus

name: Royal Favour
description: After scoring, cards adjacent to Queens on the grid permanently gain +1 rank

name: King's Toll
description: After scoring, cards adjacent to Kings on the grid permanently lose 1 rank

name: Ace Absorb
description: When an Ace scores, one random adjacent card is forgotten and its bonuses added to the Ace (once per hand)

name: Still Waters
description: Each swap pauses the round timer 4s

name: Compost
description: +3 pips per card discarded this round

name: Spade Flood
description: 4 or 5-card all-♠ hands add twice the remaining round time as pips

name: Devoted
description: Each ♥ scored adds +1 mult instead of +0.5

name: Sharp Edge
description: Each ♠ scored adds +2s instead of +1s

name: Hard Labour
description: Each ♣ scored adds +10 pips instead of +5

name: Appraised
description: Each ♦ scored earns +2 coins instead of +1

name: House Rules
description: Each Full House this round scores ×1.5 more than the last (resets each level)

name: Double Dutch
description: Two Pair scores +10 mult

name: Lone Wolf
description: High Card scores +(level × 2) mult

name: Underdog
description: High Card: card pips × level

name: Twenty-One
description: If the face values of your cards total exactly 21, score ×3

name: Triple Pips
description: Cards scored in a specific row or column contribute triple pips

name: Power Line
description: Cards scored in a specific row or column each add +2 mult

name: Echo Line
description: Cards scored in a specific row or column trigger their effects twice

name: Ley Line
description: Cards scored at a specific grid intersection permanently double their pips (resets each level)

name: Four Corners
description: A 2×2 hand scores ×4 pips

name: Crossroads
description: A + shaped hand scores ×3

name: Straight Shot
description: All-row or all-column hands add the first and last card's pip values to mult

name: Snake
description: A hand that changes direction every step (no 3 cards in a row or column) scores +2 mult per card

name: Corner Power
description: Cards in corner cells retrigger their card-tied bonuses once more

name: Diagonal
description: A hand containing 2 corner cells scores ×4

name: In Order
description: Runs selected in consecutive ascending or descending order score ×2

name: On the Edge
description: Hands where all cards are on the outer edge score +15 pips per card

name: Wide Reach
description: Hands spanning 4+ rows or columns score +24 mult. +5 mult per extra column, +20 pips per extra row

name: Meditation
description: Focus decays 1 second slower

name: Tunnel Vision
description: Start each round with 5 focus

name: First Wind
description: Focus does not decay for the first 45 seconds of a round

name: Rhythm
description: Each hand played adds 1 additional focus

name: Restless
description: Swapping adds 1 focus

name: Cull
description: Using a discard adds 1 focus

name: Expanse
description: Each time you hit max focus, increase max focus capacity by 1

name: Kaleidoscope
description: Playing one of each suit in a hand adds 4 focus

name: Flow State
description: While focus is ×1.5 or higher, +10 pips per card scored

name: The Queen
description: Wild rank — becomes the rank that makes the best hand. (Reach + queen-retrigger: TBD)
notes: structural — no tunable value; needsResolve / TBD

name: Warehouse
description: Wild suit — becomes any suit to complete a flush. Has no rank.

name: The Good Friend
description: Play it as part of a hand: exalts all adjacent cards. (3 charges)

name: Not a Friend
description: Discard it: corrupts all adjacent cards. (3 charges)

name: Shepherd
description: When drawn onto the grid, exalts 1 random card.

name: Idol
description: Finish the round with this on your board to earn triple interest. (Once)

name: Shortcut
description: Play it in any 4-card hand to instantly complete the active challenge. (Once)

name: Fight the Power
description: While on the grid, all boss effects are ignored.

name: Dazed & Confused
description: When swapped, reshuffles every card on the grid.

name: Pivot!
description: When swapped, that swap is free and both swapped cards gain +5 mult permanently. (3 charges)

name: Free Swaps
description: Swapping cards costs no time.

name: Free Discards
description: Discarding costs no time.

name: Steady Hand
description: Swaps no longer count against the swap limit, but cost 2× time.

name: Hoarder
description: Discards no longer count against the discard limit, but cost 2× time.

name: Time Bank
description: +30 seconds at the start of every round.

name: Inheritance
description: Start each round with +5 coins.

name: Head Start
description: Start each round at 10% of the round goal.

name: Combo Keeper
description: Streaks survive one non-streak hand. Re-arms after 2 streak hands.

name: Lucky Seven
description: Every 7th hand played gives +1 swap.

name: tidal force
description: Flush +mult (not in current pool)

name: extinction
description: Four of a Kind ×score (not in current pool)

name: suit defaults
description: Default per-suit effects when no bonus is active

name: resources
description: Base time costs: swap, discard/card, hand play

name: exalt
description: Exalted-card per-suit effects

name: corrupt
description: Corrupted-card per-suit effects
